Open Sans font files vendored for canvas/device parity.

Source:
- https://github.com/google/fonts/tree/main/ofl/opensans

Files:
- `OpenSans[wdth,wght].ttf` (variable, upright)
- `OFL.txt` (SIL Open Font License 1.1)

License:
- SIL Open Font License, Version 1.1.
- See `OFL.txt` in this folder.

Notes:
- Keep these files unchanged to preserve licensing and reproducibility.
